behaviors.description: Static prompt-template lint rejects phase-specific instruction leakage copied from SKILL.md.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is in template/lint logic itself, not cross-module handoff. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: none. Rejected higher levels because behavior text is explicitly a static lint check.
behaviors.test_description: Call the lint function on template fixtures containing copied phase instructions and clean controls; assert reject/accept results and exact violation locations.

behaviors.description: Assembled prompt from real harness (with interpolation/fixtures) contains no phase-instruction leakage.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: leakage can appear only after module composition (template + interpolation + fixtures). Unit is too low because single-function checks can miss assembly-time contamination. REAL-INFRA: no real network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP: none. Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior is prompt assembly content, not live model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real prompt builder pipeline with representative fixtures and interpolation, then lint the final rendered prompt for leaked phase text.

behaviors.description: Test invocation loads skill context from plugin/skill files and validates behavior from that context, not hard-coded prompt rules.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: file-backed skill loader -> harness prompt/context wiring -> validation logic. Unit would miss source-of-truth drift between modules. REAL-INFRA: local filesystem only; no real OS event/network/subprocess behavior needed. LLM-DEP is not required for this specific provenance/orchestration check. Rejected Agentic because behavior text focuses on context source, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute test invocation with real skill-file loading enabled and a probe that fails if equivalent hard-coded phase rules are present; assert context provenance comes from plugin/skill files.

behaviors.description: Harness runs same user-style prompt against degraded/missing SKILL.md variant without changing test prompt text.
behaviors.justification: This is harness configuration/orchestration across modules (variant selection + prompt stability). Unit is too low because invariant spans runner + fixture/skill loading. REAL-INFRA: no real network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP: not required to verify prompt-text invariance and variant swapping capability. Rejected Agentic since behavior text is about running setup under unchanged prompt text, not output correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Run harness twice (baseline skill and degraded/missing variant) with identical user prompt fixture; assert prompt text bytes are unchanged while selected skill context source differs.

behaviors.description: When relevant SKILL.md section is removed/degraded, behavioral test fails under the same user-style prompt.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP: pass/fail depends on whether real model behavior changes when skill guidance regresses. Deterministic stubs can hide this (deterministic-assertion trap). Integration-only tests can prove wiring but not that behavior degrades. Rejected Workflow because this can be shown with a single model decision path, not multiple sequential agentic stages.
behaviors.test_description: Execute live model tests with unchanged user prompt across baseline vs degraded skill context; assert degradation causes structural-behavior assertion failure at a higher rate than baseline.

behaviors.description: Raw model output is captured to a diagnostic artifact before JSON parsing/extraction runs.
behaviors.justification: Failure is ordering across modules (model-call wrapper -> artifact writer -> parser). Unit can miss sequencing bugs between components. REAL-INFRA: local filesystem artifact creation is enough; no real network/subprocess required if model output is stubbed. LLM-DEP: none for this behavior. Rejected System/Agentic because requirement is capture ordering, not live model semantics.
behaviors.test_description: Use a stubbed model response, run harness pipeline, assert raw artifact exists and contains unparsed payload before parser/extractor invocation markers.

behaviors.description: Assertions enforce structural behavior constraints (schema paths, role-specific field placement), not only keyword checks.
behaviors.justification: Behavior targets assertion logic correctness; single assertion module can be tested directly. MOCK-MISS: no required cross-module invariant. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP: none. Rejected Integration+ because behavior text is about assertion semantics themselves.
behaviors.test_description: Feed crafted outputs to assertion functions: cases passing keywords but violating schema/role placement must fail; structurally correct cases must pass.

behaviors.description: Under live model execution, structural assertions catch regressions that keyword-only checks miss.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires live model execution and regression detection based on model-produced structure/content. LLM-DEP is direct; mocks can always pass and hide real failures. Rejected Workflow: can be validated on single-turn model outputs; no mandatory multi-step agent pipeline in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Run real model with prompt/skill variants known to induce subtle structural drift; compare structural-assertion outcomes vs keyword-only outcomes and verify only structural checks fail on regressions.
